ad_copy.headline: Experience the New Standard
ad_copy.subheadline: Elevate Your Everyday with Trusted Innovation
ad_copy.body_copy: Discover the future-forward solution designed for modern living. Professional-grade quality meets intuitive design – your next essential upgrade awaits.

variations.label: Variation A - Primary
variations.headline: Redefining Excellence
variations.body_copy: The ultimate solution for seamless performance. Built on proven expertise, engineered for real-world results.

variations.label: Variation B - Emotional
variations.headline: Unlock New Possibilities
variations.body_copy: Imagine what you can achieve with tools that keep pace with your ambition. Reliable innovation for life's demands.

variations.label: Variation C - Direct
variations.headline: Your Upgrade Awaits
variations.body_copy: Professional-grade solutions now available. Trusted quality for every user. Limited stock available.

visual_direction.layout_description: Central glowing product silhouette with radiating light beams against gradient background
visual_direction.composition: Product centered with 30% negative space above, text overlay at bottom third
visual_direction.color_usage: Primary brand colors as gradient background with bright accent highlights
visual_direction.typography_usage: Bold headline in primary font centered above product, body copy in smaller weight below
visual_direction.imagery_style: Minimal tech aesthetic with glass-effect surfaces and dynamic lighting

image_generation_prompt.stable_diffusion: Minimal premium product render, soft cinematic lighting, glass texture reflections, global illumination, centered composition, clean background gradient, no text, no logos
image_generation_prompt.midjourney: Futuristic product floating in light beams, luxury tech aesthetic, hyper-realistic materials, cinematic atmosphere, soft shadows, ultra-clean composition --ar 1:1 --v 6.0
image_generation_prompt.negative_prompt: text, logos, watermark, people, cartoonish, low contrast, messy background

zones.top: Negative space with subtle brand color gradient
zones.middle: Central 3D product render with lighting effects
zones.bottom: Text overlay area with dark translucent layer

layout_spec.spacing_notes: 20px padding on all sides, 150px safe zone around edges

brand_compliance_notes: Maintains professional tone through clean typography and trusted color scheme. Visual hierarchy emphasizes reliability while modern aesthetics signal innovation.
ab_testing_tips: Test emotional vs direct CTAs. Compare gradient backgrounds vs solid colors. Experiment with product angles in visuals.
